must_find.description: aws-lc-rs 1.6.1 has CVE-2024-55887 (out-of-bounds memory access); upgrade to patched version
aws-lc-sys 0.24.1 has CVE-2024-55887 (transitive vulnerability from aws-lc-rs); upgrade to patched version
rollup 3.29.4 has CVE-2024-47068 (DOM clobbering XSS in bundled output); upgrade to patched version
minimatch 3.0.4 has CVE-2022-3517 (ReDoS via crafted glob patterns); upgrade to >= 3.0.5

must_not_flag.description: The TLS configuration logic itself is correct; the issue is only the vulnerable dependency version
The npx rollup invocation uses arg() properly without shell interpolation; the issue is the rollup version, not command injection
